cells: singular countable nouns (not specific)
_I need to get **a** new coat._
cells_uz: birlik sanaladigan otlar (noaniq)
_I need to get **a** new coat._
cells_ru: единственное число исчисляемых существительных (неопределённых)
_I need to get **a** new coat._

cells: instead of a when the next word begins with a vowel sound
_I don't have enough money for **an** expensive dress._
cells_uz: keyingi so'z unli tovush bilan boshlanganida a o'rnida ishlatiladi
_I don't have enough money for **an** expensive dress._
cells_ru: вместо a, когда следующее слово начинается с гласного звука
_I don't have enough money for **an** expensive dress._

tip.label: Watch out!
tip.translation:
a yoki an ishlatish so'zning imlosi emas, **tovushi**ga bog'liq. Quyidagi so'zlarga e'tibor bering:
• _**an** honest person_ • _**an** hour_ • _**a** euro_ • _**a** uniform
tip.translation_ru:
Выбор между a и an зависит от **звука**, а не от написания слова. Обратите внимание на следующие слова:
• _**an** honest person_ • _**an** hour_ • _**a** euro_ • _**a** uniform

cells: singular countable nouns (specific)
_Let's go to **the** new shopping centre._
cells_uz: birlik sanaladigan otlar (aniq)
_Let's go to **the** new shopping centre._
cells_ru: единственное число исчисляемых существительных (определённых)
_Let's go to **the** new shopping centre._

cells: plural countable nouns (specific)
_Where are **the** books I ordered?_
cells_uz: ko'plik sanaladigan otlar (aniq)
_Where are **the** books I ordered?_
cells_ru: множественное число исчисляемых существительных (определённых)
_Where are **the** books I ordered?_

cells: uncountable nouns (specific)
_I gave the shop assistant **the** money and then left._
cells_uz: sanalmaydigan otlar (aniq)
_I gave the shop assistant **the** money and then left._
cells_ru: неисчисляемые существительные (определённые)
_I gave the shop assistant **the** money and then left._

cells: plural countable nouns (general)
_Prices have gone up a lot recently._
cells_uz: ko'plik sanaladigan otlar (umumiy)
_Prices have gone up a lot recently._
cells_ru: множественное число исчисляемых существительных (в общем смысле)
_Prices have gone up a lot recently._

cells: uncountable nouns (general)
_Fresh fruit is really good for you._
cells_uz: sanalmaydigan otlar (umumiy)
_Fresh fruit is really good for you._
cells_ru: неисчисляемые существительные (в общем смысле)
_Fresh fruit is really good for you._

cells:
**places**
**the**: seas, rivers, areas, some countries, the UK, public buildings, the Earth, the world, the sky, the moon, the sun, the sea, the environment
**no article**: towns and cities, most countries, continents, streets, planets

_**the** Atlantic, **the** Amazon, **the** Antarctic, **the** USA, **the** theatre_
_Moscow, France, Europe, Baker Street, Mars_
cells_uz:
**joylar**
**the**: dengizlar, daryolar, hududlar, ba'zi mamlakatlar, UK, jamoat binolari, Yer, dunyo, osmon, oy, quyosh, dengiz, atrof-muhit
**artiklsiz**: shahar va qishloqlar, aksariyat mamlakatlar, qit'alar, ko'chalar, sayyoralar

_**the** Atlantic, **the** Amazon, **the** Antarctic, **the** USA, **the** theatre_
_Moscow, France, Europe, Baker Street, Mars_
cells_ru:
**места**
**the**: моря, реки, районы, некоторые страны, Великобритания, общественные здания, Земля, мир, небо, луна, солнце, море, окружающая среда
**без артикля**: города и сёла, большинство стран, континенты, улицы, планеты

_**the** Atlantic, **the** Amazon, **the** Antarctic, **the** USA, **the** theatre_
_Moscow, France, Europe, Baker Street, Mars_

cells:
**activities**
**a/an**: have a job, work as a ...
**the**: on the radio, the media, play the piano
**no article**: go to work, on TV, go shopping, play tennis, listen to music, go to work, go to school, be at school, be at university, school subjects

_have **a** job, work as **a** teacher_
_on **the** radio, play **the** piano_
_go to work, on TV, play tennis_
cells_uz:
**faoliyatlar**
**a/an**: have a job, work as a ...
**the**: on the radio, the media, play the piano
**artiklsiz**: go to work, on TV, go shopping, play tennis, listen to music, go to school, be at school, be at university, maktab fanlari

_have **a** job, work as **a** teacher_
_on **the** radio, play **the** piano_
_go to work, on TV, play tennis_
cells_ru:
**виды деятельности**
**a/an**: have a job, work as a ...
**the**: on the radio, the media, play the piano
**без артикля**: go to work, on TV, go shopping, play tennis, listen to music, go to school, be at school, be at university, школьные предметы

_have **a** job, work as **a** teacher_
_on **the** radio, play **the** piano_
_go to work, on TV, play tennis_

cells:
**time**
**the**: in the morning/afternoon/evening, on the 20th March, in the 1950s
**no article**: days (Thursday), months (May), years (2009), at night

_in **the** morning, on **the** 20th March, in **the** 1950s_
_on Thursday, in May, in 2009, at night_
cells_uz:
**vaqt**
**the**: in the morning/afternoon/evening, on the 20th March, in the 1950s
**artiklsiz**: kunlar (Thursday), oylar (May), yillar (2009), at night

_in **the** morning, on **the** 20th March, in **the** 1950s_
_on Thursday, in May, in 2009, at night_
cells_ru:
**время**
**the**: in the morning/afternoon/evening, on the 20th March, in the 1950s
**без артикля**: дни недели (Thursday), месяцы (May), годы (2009), at night

_in **the** morning, on **the** 20th March, in **the** 1950s_
_on Thursday, in May, in 2009, at night_

cells:
**people**

**the**: the King, the Prime Minister, the army, the navy, the police, the Germans, the English
